records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, there are a lot of Tucker's goons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, there are a lot of Tucker's goons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, there are a lot of Tucker's goons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess the Black Flood helped your career, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess the Black Flood helped your career, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess the Black Flood helped your career, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmf! Mmph!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmf! Mmph!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmf! Mmph!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, you're all just chumps who are no different from civilians.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, you're all just chumps who are no different from civilians.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, you're all just chumps who are no different from civilians.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To let these punks become pirates. Tucker's got a bad eye for people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To let these punks become pirates. Tucker's got a bad eye for people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To let these punks become pirates. Tucker's got a bad eye for people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmff! MMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmff! MMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmff! MMMMPH!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, I think she's trying to say something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, I think she's trying to say something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, I think she's trying to say something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft. I bet she's pleading for her life. This is why choices in life matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft. I bet she's pleading for her life. This is why choices in life matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft. I bet she's pleading for her life. This is why choices in life matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our captain may have a bad personality and a pirate's mouth, and she may be an attention-seeker on Wing-stagram, but she's still a Grade A Counter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our captain may have a bad personality and a pirate's mouth, and she may be an attention-seeker on Wing-stagram, but she's still a Grade A Counter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our captain may have a bad personality and a pirate's mouth, and she may be an attention-seeker on Wing-stagram, but she's still a Grade A Counter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sonya, toss her overboard as fish bait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sonya, toss her overboard as fish bait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sonya, toss her overboard as fish bait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. You see, I hate noisy things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. You see, I hate noisy things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. You see, I hate noisy things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we've rested, I'll go find the grunts who are in hiding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we've rested, I'll go find the grunts who are in hiding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we've rested, I'll go find the grunts who are in hiding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good timing. I was getting a little restless myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good timing. I was getting a little restless myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good timing. I was getting a little restless myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see what faces these tail-tucking scurvy dogs will make.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see what faces these tail-tucking scurvy dogs will make.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see what faces these tail-tucking scurvy dogs will make.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie, you stay here and keep an eye on our hostage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tallie, you stay here and keep an eye on our hostage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tallie, you stay here and keep an eye on our hostage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Leave it to me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Leave it to me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Leave it to me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waah! Wait, this is so unfair! These kinds of jobs are supposed to be done by the rookie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waah! Wait, this is so unfair! These kinds of jobs are supposed to be done by the rookie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waah! Wait, this is so unfair! These kinds of jobs are supposed to be done by the rookie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can we at least decide on rock, paper, scissors?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can we at least decide on rock, paper, scissors?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can we at least decide on rock, paper, scissors?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Seriously? They're just going to leave me like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Seriously? They're just going to leave me like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Seriously? They're just going to leave me like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How stupid are they? Do they think that this corporate-made ship is just for show...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How stupid are they? Do they think that this corporate-made ship is just for show...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How stupid are they? Do they think that this corporate-made ship is just for show...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can still call a rescue signal even if I'm tied up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can still call a rescue signal even if I'm tied up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can still call a rescue signal even if I'm tied up.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Okay. I've successfully connected to the emergency server. Now, all I have to do is press the butto
8g

Okay. I've successfully connected to the emergency server. Now, all I have to do is press the butto
8g

Okay. I've successfully connected to the emergency server. Now, all I have to do is press the butto

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I pressed the wrong one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I pressed the wrong one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I pressed the wrong one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Emergency protocol system activated. Beginning the deletion process of all data on the ship.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Emergency protocol system activated. Beginning the deletion process of all data on the ship.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Emergency protocol system activated. Beginning the deletion process of all data on the ship.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. The deletion process of all data on the ship will begin. All personnel on board are requested to evacuate immediately.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. The deletion process of all data on the ship will begin. All personnel on board are requested to evacuate immediately.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. The deletion process of all data on the ship will begin. All personnel on board are requested to evacuate immediately.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tallie...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tallie...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! It wasn't me this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! It wasn't me this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! It wasn't me this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe my cannon hit something it shouldn't have?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe my cannon hit something it shouldn't have?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe my cannon hit something it shouldn't have?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. I wasn't sure, but I guess it was that girl's doing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. I wasn't sure, but I guess it was that girl's doing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. I wasn't sure, but I guess it was that girl's doing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Tucker! A ship of this size should have a lifeboat, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Tucker! A ship of this size should have a lifeboat, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Tucker! A ship of this size should have a lifeboat, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's put our differences aside for now and focus on surviving. You don't want to be buried out here, do you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's put our differences aside for now and focus on surviving. You don't want to be buried out here, do you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's put our differences aside for now and focus on surviving. You don't want to be buried out here, do you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't kid yourself! You want to make amends after causing all that ruckus?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't kid yourself! You want to make amends after causing all that ruckus?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't kid yourself! You want to make amends after causing all that ruckus?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You even have that convenience store girl as your hostage!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You even have that convenience store girl as your hostage!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You even have that convenience store girl as your hostage!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit acting like an amateur! Pirates are supposed to act upon the situation, not their goals!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit acting like an amateur! Pirates are supposed to act upon the situation, not their goals!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit acting like an amateur! Pirates are supposed to act upon the situation, not their goals!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmf! Mmph!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmf! Mmph!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmf! Mmph!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMPH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMPH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMPH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said, I'm not copying you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said, I'm not copying you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said, I'm not copying you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMMPH!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Captain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Captain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Captain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Captain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! You're the best! I love you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! You're the best! I love you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! You're the best! I love you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...

records.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMPH...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMPH...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMPH...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all you have to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all you have to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all you have to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. I've said everything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. I've said everything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. I've said everything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant Kang!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant Kang!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant Kang!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Any final words?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Any final words?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Any final words?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you just let me off with a warning? Pleaaaaaase!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you just let me off with a warning? Pleaaaaaase!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Quit acting like an amateur! Pirates are supposed to act upon the situation, not their goals!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She can access to the ship's main functions. Nothing good will come out of getting involved with her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who presses the self-destruct button without a plan? Kya hah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mmf! Mmph!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mmf! Mmph!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mmf! Mmph!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMPH!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMPH!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMPH!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Choose. Either fight us and we all become fish food. Or you yield your stubborn pride.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The captain may abandon the ship, but they don't abandon the crew, Mr. Knockoff!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like I said, I'm not copying you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like I said, I'm not copying you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like I said, I'm not copying you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Just know that I'm only doing this for my crew, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All hands! Prepare to abandon ship!

root.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMMPH!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMMPH!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMMPH!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're all here. Now, let's get out of here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Captain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Captain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Captain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't. Nothing ever goes right when you make that face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rude! I was just wondering if it'll be a problem if I shoot the already-exploding ship...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By Tallie's standards, she's already done enough by asking before pulling the trigger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Captain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Captain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Captain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kya hah hah! Do what you want. If it's already going down, let's send it off with our own hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! You're the best! I love you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! You're the best! I love you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! You're the best! I love you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mmmf... Mm... Mmph...

root.m_Talk_ENG: MMMMPH...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: MMMMPH...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: MMMMPH...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate's dream...! Ending it with a kaboom!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all you have to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all you have to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all you have to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. I've said everything...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. I've said everything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. I've said everything...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A ship terrorist in this age. A bit unreasonable, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure if you believe me, but it was a set-up. I'm not innocent, just closer to not guilty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I opened my eyes, everyone was gone and I got framed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. You can tell us the rest after we transfer you over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe this just had to happen on my day off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But at least you won't become a sentenced laborer in Front Bay since a corporation is involved.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It could've been worse, you know? Haha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant Kang!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant Kang!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant Kang!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. Sorry about that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Any final words?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Any final words?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Any final words?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... I'm sorry for causing trouble on your day off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you just let me off with a warning? Pleaaaaaase!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you just let me off with a warning? Pleaaaaaase!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you just let me off with a warning? Pleaaaaaase!
